name: Census Geocoder — geography lookup
purpose: Resolve a known Santa Clara address to geographies/FIPS for routing; in MVP, use ZIP/city/county only unless user explicitly opts into exact address for directions.
expected: HTTP 200; one address match; county should resolve to Santa Clara County / CA geography. Do not store the submitted street address.

name: HealthCare.gov Content API — site index
purpose: Verify JSON content API is reachable and returns content metadata for health-coverage explanations.
expected: HTTP 200; JSON array/object with content URLs and language metadata.

name: HealthCare.gov Content API — glossary collection
purpose: Verify collection endpoint for health terms.
expected: HTTP 200; JSON object with glossary collection.

name: HUD Housing Counselor API — city/state search
purpose: Find HUD-approved housing counselors by city/state for housing handoff.
expected: HTTP 200 or 202; response array of agencies. Cache public contact data only with retrieved_at and call-before-going copy.

name: HUD Housing Counselor API — location search
purpose: Find HUD-approved housing counselors near San José by lat/long.
expected: HTTP 200/202 if endpoint accepts searchByLocation; otherwise record API shape drift and use city/state endpoint.

name: DataSF/Socrata — discovery search
purpose: Find candidate San Francisco datasets for service/resource enrichment; not required for runtime packet generation.
expected: HTTP 200; catalog results. Any selected dataset still requires terms review and source approval.

name: DataSF/Socrata — known dataset mechanics
purpose: Smoke-test SODA endpoint mechanics on a known DataSF dataset; not used for benefits logic.
expected: HTTP 200; sample row. Confirms SODA endpoint mechanics. Do not use unrelated datasets in product output.
